product_overview: MyCVRoast is an AI-powered career platform that helps users roast resumes, build ATS-friendly resumes, generate LinkedIn feedback, and access job-search tools. Users can start as guests, then sign in to save history, use dashboard tools, and upgrade to Pro for unlimited access.
core_goals: Let guests upload a resume and receive an AI roast with score and feedback
Let users create an account and access a personalized dashboard
Help users build and export an ATS-friendly resume
Let users compare Free vs Pro plans and upgrade to Pro
Let users generate LinkedIn feedback and other career content tools
Let Pro users practice mock interviews with AI questions and voice playback

features.name: Guest CV Roast
features.description: Users can upload a resume or paste resume text on the homepage and receive an AI roast with score, feedback, and a shareable result page without creating an account.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Upload a PDF or paste resume text -> Choose roast intensity and language -> Submit the roast request -> See the loading state -> View the roast result page with score, feedback, and share link
Navigate to / -> Upload a resume file in an unsupported format -> See a validation error
Navigate to / -> Upload a resume file that is too large -> See a validation error
Navigate to / -> Complete two guest roasts on the same browser fingerprint -> Attempt another roast -> See a guest limit notice

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Users can sign up or sign in with email and password to access the dashboard and protected features.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Enter email and password -> Submit the sign-in form -> See redirect to /dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Enter email and password -> Submit the sign-up form -> See redirect to /dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Enter invalid credentials -> Submit the form -> See a validation error
Navigate to /login -> Choose the Google sign-in option -> Complete the external authentication flow -> See redirect to /dashboard

features.name: Dashboard CV Roast
features.description: Signed-in users can roast a CV from within the dashboard and have the result saved to their account history.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/roast -> Upload or paste a CV -> Submit the roast request -> View the roast result and continue to history
Navigate to /dashboard/roast -> Upload or paste a CV -> Submit the roast request -> Open the saved result from history

features.name: Resume Builder
features.description: Users can create an ATS-friendly resume, preview changes live, switch templates, and export the resume as a PDF within their plan limits.
user_flows: Navigate to /resume-builder -> Fill in personal details, experience, education, and skills -> Switch templates -> Review the live preview -> Download the PDF
Navigate to /resume-builder -> Continue exporting PDFs until the free limit is reached -> Attempt another download -> See an upgrade prompt
Navigate to /dashboard/resume-builder -> Load a saved CV -> Edit resume content -> Review the preview -> Export the updated PDF

features.name: Plans and Pro Upgrade
features.description: Users can compare Free versus Pro offerings and purchase Pro from the plans page or dashboard billing area.
user_flows: Navigate to /plans -> Review the Free versus Pro comparison -> Inspect the full tool catalog and pricing -> Proceed toward account access for upgrade
Navigate to /dashboard/plans -> Review the Free versus Pro comparison -> Start the Pro checkout flow -> Complete the Razorpay payment -> See Pro access unlocked
Navigate to /dashboard/plans -> Start the checkout flow -> Cancel or leave the payment flow before completion -> Return without Pro access

features.name: LinkedIn Roast
features.description: Users can paste LinkedIn profile text and receive AI critique and feedback without needing a paid account.
user_flows: Navigate to /linkedin-roast -> Paste LinkedIn headline or about text -> Submit the roast request -> Read the feedback

features.name: Career Tools Suite
features.description: Signed-in users can browse and use career tools from the dashboard, including generators and match scorers, with usage limits based on plan.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Browse the available tools -> Open a tool such as LinkedIn writer, cover letter, or JD match -> Fill in the requested inputs -> Generate the result -> View the markdown output panel
Navigate to /dashboard -> Open a free-limited tool -> Generate results until the limit is reached -> Attempt another generation -> See an upgrade prompt

features.name: Mock Interview
features.description: Pro users can run an AI mock interview with voice playback, speech-to-text, and multi-turn question and answer exchanges.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/tools/mock-interview -> Select an interviewer voice -> Play the demo voice -> Enter a job role and interview settings -> Start the interview -> Listen to the AI question -> Type or speak an answer -> Continue to the next question
Navigate to /dashboard/tools/mock-interview -> Try to start without the required CV input -> See a validation error
Navigate to /dashboard/tools/mock-interview -> Open the tool as a free user -> See the Pro upgrade prompt

features.name: Roast and Tool History
features.description: Signed-in users can review past roasts and previously generated tool results from their account history.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/history -> Review the list of prior roasts and generated tool results -> Open a past entry -> View the saved details

features.name: Profile and Account Settings
features.description: Signed-in users can review and manage their account profile and settings from the dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/profile -> Review account profile details -> Update editable profile information -> Save the changes
Navigate to /dashboard/settings -> Review account settings -> Trigger an account action such as password reset

features.name: Job Application Tracker
features.description: Signed-in users can track job applications from a dedicated dashboard page.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/tracker -> Add a job application entry -> Review the tracked application list -> Update an application status

features.name: Admin Panel
features.description: Admins can sign in separately and access internal dashboards for users, signups, usage, and payments.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/login -> Enter the admin password -> Submit the form -> See the admin dashboard
Navigate to /admin -> Review signups, usage, users, and payments data -> Manage user access or grant Pro

routes.description: Homepage with guest CV roast upload and marketing sections
User login and signup with email/password and Google OAuth
Public pricing and full product catalog Free vs Pro
Public ATS resume builder with PDF export limits
Public landing pages for individual tools
User dashboard overview with usage stats
Authenticated resume builder with saved CV
In-dashboard upgrade to Pro via Razorpay
Pro mock interview with ElevenLabs voice and speech-to-text

features.name: Guest CV Roast
features.description: Upload PDF or paste text on homepage for AI roast without account
user_interactions: Upload PDF or paste resume text
View score, feedback, and share link
Hit guest limit after 2 roasts per device fingerprint

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Email signup, signin, Google OAuth, password reset
user_interactions: Click Sign in or Sign up

features.name: Dashboard CV Roast
features.description: Logged-in users roast CV with history saved to account
user_interactions: View result and navigate to history

features.name: Resume Builder
features.description: ATS-friendly resume editor with live preview and PDF download
user_interactions: Fill personal info, experience, education, skills

features.name: Mock Interview
features.description: Pro-only AI mock interview with voice playback and speech recognition
user_interactions: Select interviewer voice and play demo
Enter job role and start interview
Listen to AI question via ElevenLabs audio
Type or speak answer with mic auto-send

features.name: Career Tools Suite
features.description: 29 dashboard AI tools for job search, LinkedIn, emails, salary, etc.
user_interactions: See Pro upgrade prompt when free limit exceeded

features.name: Pro Upgrade Razorpay
features.description: One-time Pro purchase unlocks unlimited usage
user_interactions: See Pro badge and unlimited access after verify

features.name: LinkedIn Roast
features.description: Paste LinkedIn profile text for AI critique

features.name: Admin Panel
features.description: Internal admin for users, signups, emails, usage, payments

known_limitations.issue: Guest roast limit is 2 per fingerprint not 5 as some marketing copy suggests
known_limitations.impact: Tests expecting 5 guest roasts will fail

known_limitations.issue: Pro-only tools show upgrade modal for free users; cannot fully test without Pro account or admin grant
known_limitations.impact: Mock interview and 11 other tools blocked for free tier

known_limitations.issue: Razorpay checkout requires real payment sandbox or mocked flow in test env
known_limitations.impact: End-to-end Pro purchase may need test keys
Mock interview voice fails without API key configured

known_limitations.issue: Admin auth is separate from user Supabase auth with env-based password
known_limitations.impact: Admin tests need ADMIN_PASSWORD env var
